name: Job Scout Agent
description: AI-powered job search agent that searches the web for job listings matching a given location and keywords, then extracts structured job descriptions using an LLM. Part of the NANDA Job Scout project.

input_schema.location: string — geographic area (default: Greater Boston Area)
input_schema.num_results: int 1-10 — number of jobs to return

output_schema.jobs: array of {company, job_title, estimated_salary, core_skills, summary, apply_link}
